exercises.code:
from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = "Entrada"
ws["A1"] = "region"
print(wb.sheetnames)
print(ws["A1"].value)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.append(["region", "monto"])
ws.append(["Lima", 10.0])
print(ws.max_row)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
wb.active.title = "Datos"
wb.create_sheet("Salida")
print(wb.sheetnames)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A3"] = "=A1+A2"
print(str(ws["A3"].value).startswith("="))

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = 3
ws["A2"] = 4

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"].font = Font(bold=True)
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import PatternFill
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"].fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")
print(ws["A1"].fill is not None)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill

def header_style(ws, cell):
    c = ws[cell]
    c.font = Font(bold=True)
    c.fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
header_style(ws, "A1")
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from datetime import date
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = date(2024, 1, 15)
print(ws["A1"].value.isoformat())

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.merge_cells("B1:C1")
ws["B1"] = "x"
print(ws["C1"].value)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.merge_cells("A1:B1")
ws.merge_cells("C1:D1")
print(len(ws.merged_cells.ranges))

det_sum = 10 + 5
portada = 15
print(abs(det_sum - portada) < 0.01)

import pandas as pd
det = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 7.0]})
print(det.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())
exercises.note: Hints groupby sum to_dict; theory 10+5 Lima, 7 Cusco.

exercises.code:
def reconcile(det_sum, portada, tol=0.01):
    return abs(det_sum - portada) < tol

print(reconcile(22.0, 22.005))
print(reconcile(22.0, 23))

expected = ["region", "monto"]
got = ["region", "monto"]
print(got == expected)

regions = ["Lima", "Piura"]
allowed = {"Lima", "Cusco"}
bad = [r for r in regions if r not in allowed]
print(bad)

def validate_rows(rows, allowed):
    return [r["region"] for r in rows if r["region"] not in allowed]

rows = [{"region": "Lima"}, {"region": "Piura"}]
print(validate_rows(rows, {"Lima", "Cusco"}))

st = ["ok", "corrupt", "ok"]
print(sum(1 for v in st if v == "ok"))

name = "report.lock"
status = "locked" if name.endswith(".lock") or "lock" in name else "ok"
print(status)

manifest = {"backup": "results.prev.xlsx", "idempotent": True}
print(manifest)

import hashlib

def build(rows):
    lines = ["region,monto"] + [f"{r},{m}" for r, m in sorted(rows)]
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"

a = build([("Lima", 10), ("Cusco", 5)])
b = build([("Cusco", 5), ("Lima", 10)])
print(hashlib.sha1(a.encode()).hexdigest() == hashlib.sha1(b.encode()).hexdigest())
